title: [release-1.41] tag v1.41.5
body:
#### What type of PR is this?

/kind other

#### What this PR does / why we need it:

Tag a v1.41.5 release, mainly to pull in #6389.

Fixes: https://issues.redhat.com/browse/RHEL-115166 and https://issues.redhat.com/browse/RHEL-115167

#### How to verify it

Existing tests.

#### Which issue(s) this PR fixes:

#### Special notes for your reviewer:

#### Does this PR introduce a user-facing change?

```release-note
None
```

We need a RHEL Jira card that's been approved for a 0day release before we merge this.  @ddarrah
A Jira card was created earlier, I've added it to the description.
@lsm5 is it safe to merge this "by hand"?
